scripts.build:wasm:relaxed: cross-env RUSTFLAGS="-C target-feature=+simd128,+relaxed-simd" wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg-relaxed --release
scripts.build:wasm: bun run build:wasm:base && bun run build:wasm:relaxed
scripts.build:wasm:node:relaxed: cross-env RUSTFLAGS="-C target-feature=+simd128,+relaxed-simd" wasm-pack build --target nodejs --out-dir pkg-node-relaxed --release
scripts.build:wasm:node: bun run build:wasm:node:base && bun run build:wasm:node:relaxed
scripts.bench: bun run build:wasm && cross-env BENCHMARK=true vite --open /benchmark.html
scripts.build:bench: bun run build:wasm && cross-env BENCHMARK=true vite build
